nodes.label: Claude Code Agent Skills
nodes.rationale: Core subject of the entire course. Skills are reusable instruction sets packaged as SKILL.md files that shape Claude Code behavior. They differ from system prompts (modular vs monolithic), MCP servers (behavioral instructions vs external tools), and Cursor's .cursorrules (directory-based, multi-scope, marketplace-distributable).

nodes.label: abstract-writer Skill
nodes.rationale: Hand-built skill for generating conference talk abstracts. Teaches skill anatomy (frontmatter, body, templates). Demonstrates the instruction + supporting files complexity level.

nodes.label: conf-finder Skill
nodes.rationale: Generated via skill-creator meta-skill then refined. Teaches the difference between generated and hand-crafted skills and the refinement process.

nodes.label: trip-report Skill
nodes.rationale: Most complex skill with executable components (Python formatting script). Demonstrates the skill-with-scripts complexity level.

nodes.label: conference-toolkit Marketplace
nodes.rationale: The bundled marketplace containing all three conference skills. Teaches plugin packaging, marketplace.json, plugin.json, namespacing, and git-based distribution.

nodes.label: skill-creator Meta-Skill
nodes.rationale: A skill that creates other skills. First exposure to meta-skills concept and the Anthropic official marketplace.

nodes.label: Superpowers Harness Skills
nodes.rationale: Harness-layer skills that shape HOW you work (brainstorming, TDD, debugging). Operates at a different abstraction level than domain skills, demonstrating non-conflicting composition.

nodes.label: Progressive Disclosure (Skill Loading Model)
nodes.rationale: Two-phase loading: frontmatter (name+description) always in context, full body loaded only on activation. Design trade-off between always-available skill awareness and token efficiency.

nodes.label: Layered Skill Ecosystem
nodes.rationale: Three layers (harness/domain/workflow) operate at different abstraction levels and compose without conflict. Harness shapes HOW, domain provides WHAT, workflow tracks WHERE.

nodes.label: SKILL.md File Convention
nodes.rationale: Convention for skill packaging: YAML frontmatter (name, description) + markdown body instructions. Evolved from Cursor's single .cursorrules file to directory-based, multi-scope, composable format.

nodes.label: AsciiDoc Showroom Conventions
nodes.rationale: Conventions for Showroom content: role=execute for copy buttons, link=self for lightbox, no trailing periods after credentials, no blank lines after ==== delimiter, pre-render Mermaid as SVGs.

nodes.label: Module Structure Pattern
nodes.rationale: Five-step pattern for each module: intro (what/why), concept explanation (theory), guided exercise (hands-on), verification (confirm), summary (recap + next). Ensures consistent learner experience.

nodes.label: Skill Complexity Spectrum
nodes.rationale: Three-level classification: instruction-only (pure SKILL.md), with supporting files (templates/reference), with executable components (scripts). Guides learners on when to choose each level.

nodes.label: Sidebar Navigation (RPM Native Container, GitHub Sourced Container, Dev Mode)
nodes.norm_label: sidebar navigation (rpm native container, github sourced container, dev mode)

nodes.label: Showroom Attribute Variables (guid, ssh_user, ssh_password, bastion hostname)
nodes.norm_label: showroom attribute variables (guid, ssh_user, ssh_password, bastion hostname)
